key_threats: Nothing to lose — may play with freedom and produce an unexpected performance
Watch for a solitary dangerman — even weak sides often have one quality batter
key_weaknesses: 0 wins from 8 completed games — statistically the weakest batting lineup in Group B
NRR of -3.16 is second worst in Group B — significant run deficits in losses
No wins means minimal match experience under pressure — will likely fold in a chase

counter_strategy.how_to_bowl: Keep it disciplined — there's a risk of complacency against a winless side. Stick to line and length, avoid giving easy singles. Target them out cheaply (under 60).
counter_strategy.matchup_recommendations: Ideal game to rest Ajinkya Pradhan for a couple of overs and develop depth. Give Siddhant Kumar and Amanraj Gupta more bowling time.
